raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a thorough critique of the related-work/contribution section, identifying several major issues and providing concrete revision recommendations. The agent maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and articulates the delta clearly.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides detailed feedback on the citations. The agent also verifies the accuracy of the citations and suggests corrections.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure. The agent also identifies potential issues with the Volkov & Petrenko (2018) reference and suggests verification.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all the required dimensions. The agent provides a thorough analysis of the contribution paragraph and suggests revisions to improve clarity and accuracy.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, and the agent identifies potential issues with the original text that could be harmful or misleading. The agent provides constructive feedback to improve the quality of the text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear provenance and traceability. The agent provides detailed explanations for each suggested revision."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a thorough critique of the related-work/contribution section, identifying several major issues and providing concrete revision recommendations. The agent maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and articulates the delta clearly.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides detailed feedback on the citations. The agent also verifies the accuracy of the citations and suggests corrections.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure. The agent also identifies potential issues with the Volkov & Petrenko (2018) reference and suggests verification.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all the required dimensions. The agent provides a thorough analysis of the contribution paragraph and suggests revisions to improve clarity and accuracy.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, and the agent identifies potential issues with the original text that could be harmful or misleading. The agent provides constructive feedback to improve the quality of the text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear provenance and traceability. The agent provides detailed explanations for each suggested revision.
